answers.label: Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)
I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
Mixed — I want variety in my environment
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

steps.title: Foundations
steps.objective: Build essential groundwork for your career

milestones.title: Complete Foundations
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Build essential groundwork for your career' by completing tasks such as: (Earn a cbap).

tasks.title: (Earn a cbap)
tasks.description: Earn a CBAP certification (Certified Business Analysis Professional) to strengthen your credentials

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of business analyst

milestones.title: Complete Industry Fundamentals
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Understand the core concepts of business analyst' by completing tasks such as: (A master's degree), (Process modeling).

tasks.title: (A master's degree)
tasks.description: Complete a master's degree in business analysis, management, or information systems

tasks.title: (Process modeling)
tasks.description: Develop skills in process modeling, stakeholder requirements gathering, and solution design

milestones.title: Complete Tools & Environment
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Set up your professional workspace' by completing tasks such as: (Learn business analysis).

tasks.title: (Learn business analysis)
tasks.description: Learn business analysis methodologies (BABOK, Agile BA, Lean process improvement)

steps.title: Core Skills Development
steps.objective: Master essential skills for business analyst

milestones.title: Complete Core Skills Development
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Master essential skills for business analyst' by completing tasks such as: ([advanced task] collaborate).

tasks.title: ([advanced task] collaborate)
tasks.description: [Advanced Task] Collaborate with a cross-functional team to solve a real-world problem related to business analyst, documenting decisions, trade-offs, and lessons learned.

children.title: Requirements Gathering And Documentation Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in requirements gathering and documentation

milestones.title: Complete Requirements Gathering And Documentation Proficiency
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Develop proficiency in requirements gathering and documentation' by completing tasks such as: (End-to-end analysis projects).

tasks.title: (End-to-end analysis projects)
tasks.description: Complete end-to-end analysis projects documenting processes, gaps, and proposed solutions

children.title: Process Mapping And Analysis Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in process mapping and analysis

milestones.title: Complete Process Mapping And Analysis Proficiency
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Develop proficiency in process mapping and analysis' by completing tasks such as: (Communication skills for).

tasks.title: (Communication skills for)
tasks.description: Build communication skills for translating complex business problems into clear requirements

milestones.title: Complete Stakeholder Management Proficiency
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Develop proficiency in stakeholder management' by completing tasks such as: (For business analyst).

tasks.title: (For business analyst)
tasks.description: Apply for business analyst roles in consultancy, banking, healthcare, or technology sectors

milestones.title: Complete Gap Analysis Proficiency
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Develop proficiency in gap analysis' by completing tasks such as: ([advanced task] design).

tasks.title: ([advanced task] design)
tasks.description: [Advanced Task] Design and complete a multi-month capstone project that demonstrates end-to-end responsibilities of a business analyst, from initial planning to final delivery.

steps.title: Practical Application
steps.objective: Gain hands-on experience through projects or simulations

milestones.title: Complete Practical Application
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Gain hands-on experience through projects or simulations' by completing tasks such as: ([expert task] lead).

tasks.title: ([expert task] lead)
tasks.description: [Expert Task] Lead a mentoring or coaching programme for juniors interested in becoming a business analyst, including structured feedback and progress tracking.

children.title: Applied Practice Project
children.objective: Apply core skills in a realistic scenario

milestones.title: Complete Applied Practice Project
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Apply core skills in a realistic scenario' by completing tasks such as: ([advanced task] build), ([advanced task] deep).

tasks.title: ([advanced task] build)
tasks.description: [Advanced Task] Build a detailed portfolio case study for business analyst, including goals, research, implementation steps, and measurable outcomes.

tasks.title: ([advanced task] deep)
tasks.description: [Advanced Task] Deep dive into advanced requirements gathering and documentation by completing an intensive course, implementing a complex practice project, and seeking feedback from an experienced mentor.

milestones.title: Complete Advanced Capstone
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Demonstrate comprehensive mastery' by completing tasks such as: ([advanced task] combine).

tasks.title: ([advanced task] combine)
tasks.description: [Advanced Task] Combine requirements gathering and documentation with process mapping and analysis in a single integrated project that mirrors realistic business analyst responsibilities.

milestones.title: Complete Specialization
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Develop expertise in specific areas' by completing tasks such as: ([expert task] map).

tasks.title: ([expert task] map)
tasks.description: [Expert Task] Map out a 12–18 month professional development plan for your path as a business analyst, including certifications, projects, and networking milestones.

children.title: Specialization Track
children.objective: Deep dive into a specific area

milestones.title: Complete Specialization Track
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Deep dive into a specific area' by completing tasks such as: ([expert task] contribute).

tasks.title: ([expert task] contribute)
tasks.description: [Expert Task] Contribute to the wider community for business analyst by writing an in-depth blog post, recording a talk, or speaking at a local meetup or conference.

steps.title: Career Launch
steps.objective: Land your first role in the field

milestones.title: Complete Career Launch
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Land your first role in the field' by completing tasks such as: (Job offer 1).

tasks.title: (Job offer 1)
tasks.description: Secure job offer 1

milestones.title: Complete Professional Branding
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Create compelling professional presence' by completing tasks such as: ([expert task] perform).

tasks.title: ([expert task] perform)
tasks.description: [Expert Task] Perform a full retrospective on a complex business analyst project, identifying risks, failures, and improvements, and turn it into a reusable internal playbook.

milestones.title: Complete Job Search Strategy
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Execute systematic job search' by completing tasks such as: ([expert task] design).

tasks.title: ([expert task] design)
tasks.description: [Expert Task] Design and deliver a workshop that teaches requirements gathering and documentation to others, including hands-on exercises, example projects, and assessment criteria.
